channel.title: React on Yutong Jin
channel.description: Recent content in React on Yutong Jin

item.title: LOLSummonerInfoApp
item.description:
Overview

LOLSummonerInfoApp is a React app built around League of Legends player information. The repo structure is straight Create React App, which suggests the focus was on product behavior and API/UI integration rather than custom build tooling.

What It Represents

  • game-adjacent product building
  • React single-page app workflow
  • pulling structured data into a user-facing dashboard

Stack

  • React
  • JavaScript
  • HTML/CSS
  • Create React App

Repo

  • GitHub: yutongjin/LOLSummonerInfoApp
